description: Held-out known-answer queries for Brain consumption recall. This fixture lives outside every registered .brain root so qmd cannot index its own prompts.

queries.query: Where is the rule that rebuildable indexes must never become canonical memory?
queries.description: Find the durable-source versus disposable-projection decision.

queries.query: How are aging memory atoms condensed while retaining their links and citations?
queries.description: Find the observational-memory map's edge-preserving compaction decision.

queries.query: What evidence chose local hybrid markdown search as the knowledge projection?
queries.description: Find the qmd adoption spike receipt.

queries.query: Which runtime note records the observer recursion tombstone and the too-narrow activity scan?
queries.description: Find the distilled runtime observation that triggered the observer follow-up work.

queries.query: Where is the contract that relevance proposes candidates but graph structure decides relationships?
queries.description: Find the Brain Graph map that owns the proposes/disposes boundary.
